approaches.title: HashSet with duplicate filtering
approaches.summary: Uses a HashSet to avoid duplicates but fails due to incorrect loop bounds and duplicate handling.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial attempt with HashSet to deduplicate triplets, but loop bounds and duplicate handling are incorrect.

approaches.title: Two-pointers on sorted array
approaches.summary: Sorts the array and uses two pointers to find triplets summing to zero, with duplicate skipping.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized solution using two pointers on a sorted array with duplicate skipping for O(n^2) time and O(1) space.
